BatchAddIp.secondaryPrivateIpAddressCount: Number of IPv6/IPv4 addresses to add; must be present if privateIps is absent
BatchAddIp.privateIps: IPv6/IPv4 addresses to add; must be present if secondaryPrivateIpAddressCount is absent
BatchAddIp.allocateMultiIpv6Addr: Whether to allocate IPv6; must be true when creating IPv6 addresses
